title: ruwsh #7326
definition:
1) to be poor, be in want, lack
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be poor
        1a2) to be in want or hunger
        1a3) poor man (subst)
    1b) (Hithpolel) one impoverishing himself (participle)
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be poor
        1a2) to be in want or hunger
        1a3) poor man (subst)
    1b) (Hithpolel) one impoverishing himself (participle)

    NASB:  to be in want or poor
